class.name: ASStateCacheEntry
class.brief_description: Lightweight state cache entry for high-performance rollback.
class.description:
ASStateCacheEntry represents a minimal state snapshot for a specific tick. Used internally by ASStateCache for fast state restoration during multiplayer rollback.
Stores only essential state information: attributes, tags, and active effects. Optimized for memory efficiency and fast serialization/deserialization.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all cached state data and resets tick to 0.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns true if this entry contains valid state data (tick > 0).

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the cache entry to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads cache entry data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The tick number this state entry represents.
Map of attribute names to their base values at this tick.
Array of all tags the component had at this tick.
Array of ASEffectState objects representing active effects at this tick.
